description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte olive-green body accented by a red stripe along the upper receiver. The barrel is short and capped with a red-tipped muzzle, suggesting a non-lethal or training variant. The grip and magazine are integrated into a single, curved unit with a worn, yellowish-brown finish, and a visible number '70' is marked on the side. The top of the receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, with ergonomic finger grooves on the grip for improved handling. The overall construction appears robust, with visible screws and reinforced polymer and metal components.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with an olive-green and red body, short barrel, and integrated curved grip-magazine. Features a full-length Picatinny rail and ergonomic finger grooves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-green receiver, red accent stripe, integrated grip-magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel with a red-tipped muzzle and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the number '70' visible on the grip-magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the alignment of the Picatinny rail, with the grip extending downward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with a red-tipped muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with ergonomic finger grooves and reinforced edges
